content: I will edit `paint()` in `source/ui/DynamicDisplayComponent.h` to execute and paint the compiled LUA/Expression script over the entire bounds in play mode when a scriptable component is loaded, while maintaining default fallback rendering for other components.

args.Description: "Render compiled script over full bounds in play mode"
args.Instruction: "Update paint in DynamicDisplayComponent to evaluate and draw compiled script in play mode"
args.toolAction: "Updating play mode paint logic to evaluate LUA scripts"
